description: Payment method configuration management - add, edit, reorder, toggle payment options shown to customers. All operations are localStorage-based.
authentication: No real backend - admin auth is localStorage-based
dataStorage: Pure localStorage - key: 'payment_methods', seed: paymentMethodsData import

endpoints.name: Get All Payment Methods
endpoints.description: Retrieve all configured payment methods sorted by priority

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays payment methods list with name, icon, status, priority order, default badge, and action buttons

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Payment methods table with icon, name, description, priority number, default badge, active status toggle, and actions (edit, delete, set default, move up/down)

endpoints.name: Add Payment Method

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin submits Add Payment Method form. Validates duplicate name. If set as default, clears other defaults.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, method appears in list

endpoints.name: Update Payment Method

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin saves edited payment method. Validates name uniqueness.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast, method updates in list

endpoints.name: Delete Payment Method
endpoints.description: Remove a payment method and re-sequence priorities

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin confirms deletion. Remaining methods' priorities are re-indexed.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Confirmation dialog, success toast, method removed, priorities re-ordered

endpoints.name: Toggle Payment Method Status

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin clicks status toggle

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Status badge toggles between green (Active) and gray (Inactive)

endpoints.name: Change Priority
endpoints.description: Reorder payment method priority (swaps with target)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin uses move up/down arrows or drag-and-drop

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Method moves to new position, priority numbers update

endpoints.name: Set Default Payment Method
endpoints.description: Set one method as default (clears others)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin clicks 'Set as Default' button

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Default badge moves to selected method, others lose default status
